mapper.sql: D.ID ,D.ND ,D.GPH ,D.XM , isnull(D.BMMC, fdev.ext_dept_name) as BMMC , isnull(D.KSMC, fdev.ext_department_name) as KSMC , isnull(D.team, fdev.ext_team_name) as team , peen.entry_time as RZSJ , isnull(D.company_age, pe.company_age) as GSSL , isnull(D.worked_years, pe.worked_years) as SBGL , isnull(D.NJTS, pe.paid_annual_leave) as NJTS ,D.BZ ,D.ZHXGR ,D.ZHXGSJ ,D.duration_annual_leave ,D.create_by, D.create_time, D.real_annual_leave, D.YXJTS, D.SYXJTS, pe.ten_year_date as ten_year_date, pe.twenty_year_date as twenty_year_date, 0 as check_flag

${tAlias}.ND as ${tAlias}_ND, ${tAlias}.GPH as ${tAlias}_GPH, ${tAlias}.XM as ${tAlias}_XM, ${tAlias}.BMMC as ${tAlias}_BMMC, ${tAlias}.KSMC as ${tAlias}_KSMC, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team ${tAlias}.RZSJ as ${tAlias}_RZSJ, ${tAlias}.GL as ${tAlias}_GL, ${tAlias}.NJTS as ${tAlias}_NJTS, ${tAlias}.YXJTS as ${tAlias}_YXJTS, ${tAlias}.SYXJTS as ${tAlias}_SYXJTS, ${tAlias}.JHXJSJ as ${tAlias}_JHXJSJ, ${tAlias}.SJXJSJ as ${tAlias}_SJXJSJ, ${tAlias}.BZ as ${tAlias}_BZ, ${tAlias}.duration_annual_leave as ${tAlias}_duration_annual_leave, ${tAlias}.ID as ${tAlias}_ID, ${tAlias}.ZHXGR as ${tAlias}_ZHXGR, ${tAlias}.ZHXGSJ as ${tAlias}_ZHXGSJ, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.real_annual_leave as ${tAlias}_real_annual_leave, ${tAlias}.ten_year_date as ${tAlias}_ten_year_date, ${tAlias}.twenty_year_date as ${tAlias}_twenty_year_date

select
from DXNJ D join pm_employee pe on D.GPH = pe.work_card collate Chinese_PRC_90_CI_AI and pe.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 outer apply ( select top(1) peen_ap.* from pm_employee_entry peen_ap where peen_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND peen_ap.enabled_flag = 1 ) peen
mapper.insert: insert into DXNJ (ND, GPH, XM, BMMC, KSMC, team, RZSJ, GL, NJTS, YXJTS, SYXJTS, JHXJSJ, SJXJSJ, BZ, duration_annual_leave, ZHXGR, ZHXGSJ, create_time, create_by, real_annual_leave) values (#{nd,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{gph,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bmmc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ksmc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{team, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{rzsj,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gl,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{njts,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{yxjts,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{syxjts,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{jhxjsj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjxjsj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{durationAnnualLeave,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{zhxgr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zhxgsj,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} , #{realAnnualLeave, jdbcType = DOUBLE})

insert into DXNJ(ND, GPH, XM, create_time, create_by) select year(getdate()), pe_t.work_card , pe_t.name, getdate(), -1 from pm_employee pe_t where not exists ( select 1 from pm_employee pe join DXNJ d on d.gph = pe.work_card collate Chinese_PRC_90_CI_AI and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe_t.id = pe.id and d.ND = year(getdate()) ) and pe_t.enabled_flag = 1 and pe_t.leave_flag = 0
mapper.update: update DXNJ set ND = #{nd,jdbcType=INTEGER}, GPH = #{gph,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, XM = #{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BMMC = #{bmmc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, KSMC = #{ksmc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, team = #{team, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, RZSJ = #{rzsj,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, GL = #{gl,jdbcType=INTEGER}, NJTS = #{njts,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, YXJTS = #{yxjts,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, SYXJTS = #{syxjts,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, JHXJSJ = #{jhxjsj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SJXJSJ = #{sjxjsj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BZ = #{bz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, duration_annual_leave = #{durationAnnualLeave,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, ZHXGR = #{zhxgr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ZHXGSJ = #{zhxgsj,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(starttime, '%Y') as year ,username as work_card, IFNULL (SUM(ifnull(Number,0)),0) AS used_annual_leave FROM v_req_hrleave_not_cancel where 1 = 1
and username in
#{item, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and LeaveType = '年假' group by username, DATE_FORMAT(starttime, '%Y')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(starttime, '%Y') as year ,username as work_card, IFNULL (SUM(ifnull(Number,0)),0) AS used_annual_leave FROM v_req_hrleave_not_cancel where 1 = 1
and LeaveType = '年假' group by username, DATE_FORMAT(starttime, '%Y') order by work_card
mapper.update: update D set BMMC = fdev.ext_dept_name, KSMC = fdev.ext_department_name, team = fdev.ext_team_name, RZSJ = peen.entry_time, company_age = pe.company_age, worked_years = pe.worked_years, NJTS = pe.paid_annual_leave, real_annual_leave = pe.paid_annual_leave + isnull(D.duration_annual_leave, 0) from DXNJ D join pm_employee pe on D.GPH = pe.work_card collate Chinese_PRC_90_CI_AI and pe.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 outer apply ( select top(1) peen_ap.* from pm_employee_entry peen_ap where peen_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND peen_ap.enabled_flag = 1 ) peen where D.ND = year(getdate())

update dx set NJTS = 0 from dxnj dx join pm_employee pe on dx.GPH = pe.work_card collate Chinese_PRC_90_CI_AI and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.employee_type = '临时员工' and dx.ND = year(getdate())
mapper.select: select [ID] ,[ND] ,[GPH] ,[XM] ,[BMMC] ,[KSMC] ,[RZSJ] ,[GL] ,[NJTS] ,[YXJTS] ,[SYXJTS] ,[JHXJSJ] ,[SJXJSJ] ,[BZ] ,[ZHXGR] ,[ZHXGSJ] ,[duration_annual_leave] ,[create_time] ,[create_by] ,[real_annual_leave] ,[company_age] ,[worked_years] ,[team] from dxnj where ND = #{ND, jdbcType = INTEGER}
